name: Motor Overheating
diagnosis: Critical thermal overload of the drive motor stator windings
cause: Excessive mechanical load, blocked cooling vents, or high ambient temperatures
fix_steps: Shut down the motor drive system immediately
Verify cooling fan operation and clean ventilation ducts
Measure motor winding resistance to check for insulation breakdown
Inspect mechanical load for binding or locking before restarting

name: Bearing Failure
diagnosis: Mechanical degradation or failure of rotational shaft bearings
cause: Inadequate lubrication, contamination, misalignment, or fatigue wear
fix_steps: De-energize machine and lock out tag out the power source
Perform vibration spectrum analysis to verify bearing defects
Check lubrication levels and inspect bearing seals for damage
Replace worn bearings and realign the shaft if necessary

name: Valve Blockage
diagnosis: Flow restriction or complete obstruction within the control valve body
cause: Accumulation of particulate matter, foreign objects, or scale deposits
fix_steps: Isolate flow line and depressurize the valve body
Disassemble the valve assembly to check for debris
Clean internal orifices and inspect seats for wear
Reassemble valve, test actuator responsiveness, and restore flow

name: Excessive Vibration
diagnosis: High amplitude mechanical vibration exceeding safety thresholds
cause: Rotor unbalance, shaft misalignment, or loose structural mounting bolts
fix_steps: Reduce operational speed or pause machine cycle
Inspect and tighten structural mounting and casing bolts
Perform dynamic balance test of the rotating assembly
Check shaft alignment using dial indicators or laser tools

name: Coolant Leak
diagnosis: Loss of coolant integrity in the closed-loop thermal management system
cause: Ruptured hose, damaged radiator core, or degraded pump seals
fix_steps: Locate the leak source using visual inspection or UV dye
Depressurize and drain coolant to below the leak level
Replace damaged cooling hoses, fittings, or seals
Refill coolant reservoir and purge air bubbles from the loop

name: Pump Cavitation / Starvation
diagnosis: Vapor bubble formation and collapse due to low inlet suction pressure
cause: Restricted suction strainer, high fluid temperature, or low reservoir levels
fix_steps: Check suction line valves and strainers for blockages
Verify suction side supply tank levels and temperatures
Purge any trapped air or gas from the pump casing
Slow flow rate temporarily to restore suction pressure

name: Conveyor Belt Jam
diagnosis: Mechanical jam or overload causing conveyor stoppage
cause: Misaligned materials, trapped debris, or conveyor belt misalignment
fix_steps: Activate emergency stop and lock out power sources
Locate and remove the jammed material or debris from the line
Verify belt tension and align tracking guides
Clear warning zone and restart system under low load

name: Hydraulic Pressure Loss
diagnosis: Loss of operating pressure in the primary hydraulic circuit
cause: Hydraulic line rupture, faulty pressure relief valve, or pump failure
fix_steps: Immediately shut down hydraulic power unit (HPU)
Inspect main hoses and connections for oil leaks
Check accumulator charge and verify relief valve calibration
Refill fluid reservoir to operational level using specified hydraulic oil

name: Exhaust Temperature High
diagnosis: Exhaust gas temperature exceeding safe thermal limits
cause: Incomplete fuel combustion, overloaded cylinder, or restricted exhaust flow
fix_steps: Reduce mechanical load on the engine or turbine unit
Inspect fuel injectors and adjust fuel-to-air ratio
Check turbocharger or supercharger output pressure
Measure exhaust back pressure to check for downstream blockages

name: Agricultural Milking Machine Vacuum Pump Failure
diagnosis: Insufficient vacuum pressure in agricultural milking system
cause: Worn vacuum pump vanes, degraded regulator diaphragm, or piping line leak
fix_steps: Isolate the milking parlor to check vacuum regulator
Inspect milking claws and pipeline joints for air leaks
Clean vacuum pump inlet filter and check lubricating oil level
Replace worn pump vanes or rebuild the vacuum regulator valve
